## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming plans.](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [15 new articles published this week, 10 planned for next week; content pipeline maintained through holidays](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Recent Google updates may impact organic traffic; team to reassess mid-late January](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [New website launch in \~3 weeks will include improved conversion panels and switch to Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing non-blog pages for better lead generation and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Lead Generation

  - [Recent weeks showed fewer quality leads from content](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Most conversions from "Contentful vs Builder" and some UX design articles](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Team discussing how to measure success beyond traffic metrics](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Kyle emphasized importance of longer-term view (quarterly) for assessing individual article performance](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Devon to share more comprehensive lead generation report for better insights](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Upcoming Content and Optimization

  - [25 new articles planned over next two weeks (15 this week, 10 next week)](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [New topics needed for website design/redesign and UX/UI clusters](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Article enrichment ongoing: 3 batches complete, 4th batch due tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Andrej updating H1 and meta title optimizations, focusing on year mentions](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [5 remaining content refreshes completed](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Website Updates and SEO Strategy

  - [New site launch in \~3 weeks to include improved conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Switching to Sanity CMS; team offered technical SEO support for transition](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Discussing potential content consolidation to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Exploring opportunities to repurpose blog content for transactional/comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Considering extracting SEO value from underutilized assets (e.g., e-books)](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### Team Schedules and Holiday Plans

  - [Webstacks team off Dec 24 - Jan 6; GrowthX team working limited days](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Content pipeline maintained through holidays](https://fathom.video/share/UXMMsssw8GFmZHfzYUWmbXdJ9k4HK7Cy?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
